creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mikhail Teterin from comment #11)
> (In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #10)
> > There is still some issue with either lld or x265's assembly routines,
> > and it fails to link it on i386.
> 
> I don't think, I had a problem - neither on 10.x/i386, nor on 11.2/i386. Are
> you sure, that's not something local to your system?

On 10.x and 11.x lld is not the default /usr/bin/ld, but on my 12.x system, it is.  This LLD_UNSAFE setting simply avoids using lld if it is the default linker.
